name: LLMChat
short: AI chat via Ollama/OpenAI — responds only to @mentions in enabled channels.
description: Allows the bot to respond to @mentions in configured channels using any OpenAI-compatible API, including local Ollama models. Requires the `openai` package installed manually into your bot's venv: /data/venv/bin/pip install openai
author: Tyler-Staut
install_msg:
Thanks for installing LLMChat!

Before loading, install the openai package manually:
  /data/venv/bin/pip install openai

Then: [p]load llmchat
Setup: [p]llmchat setup
